pr.title: itdosei: Remove unnecessary stack pad, remove unnecessary const, cleanup function names and add GET_* usage
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Cleanup PR for the Dosei item code: renamed remaining it_3F14_/fn_/address-style Dosei functions to the itDosei_ prefix across symbols, header, item logic table, and implementation; removed a TU-local const 0.0f used only as an argument; replaced several direct gobj->user_data and gobj->hsd_obj accesses with GET_ITEM/GET_JOBJ; simplified small generated-looking blocks; and removed one PAD_STACK use in the spawned logic. Bot report recorded one new .sdata2 data match for main/melee/it/items/itdosei.

key_files.role: Main implementation cleanup: function renames, GET_ITEM/GET_JOBJ usage, inline 0.0f literal replacement, removal of one PAD_STACK, and small control-flow/readability simplifications.
Header prototypes updated to match renamed Dosei functions.
Item logic table references updated from it_3F14_Logic7_* names to itDosei_Logic7_* names for the Dosei table entry.
Symbol names updated at the same text addresses to match the new itDosei_* naming.

what_changed.text: Renamed Dosei functions from mixed it_3F14_Logic7_*, fn_8028xxxx, and it_8028xxxx forms to itDosei_Logic7_* or itDosei_8028xxxx forms across symbols, prototypes, definitions, and call sites.
Removed const f32 it_804DC878 = 0.0f and replaced uses of itDosei_FacingAngle(gobj, it_804DC878) with itDosei_FacingAngle(gobj, 0.0f).
Replaced several direct object field accesses with existing accessor macros, including gobj->user_data to GET_ITEM(gobj) and gobj->hsd_obj to GET_JOBJ(gobj) in selected locations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itDosei_80282DE4 and itDosei_UnkMotion10_Anim use GET_JOBJ

what_changed.text: Removed one PAD_STACK(8) from itDosei_Logic7_Spawned while two other PAD_STACK(8) instances remain in collision functions in the excerpt.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itDosei_UnkMotion0_Coll and itDosei_UnkMotion7_Coll still show PAD_STACK(8)

what_changed.text: Simplified small generated-looking code blocks, such as replacing a temporary not_msid_4 variable and nested block with a direct if (ip->msid != 4), and removing an unnecessary block around three rotation-zero calls.
Automated report recorded one new data match for main/melee/it/items/itdosei .sdata2, from 96.30% to 100.00%, +3 bytes; total matched data stayed 41.53% with +56 bytes.

smart_moves.text: Kept function renames synchronized across config symbols, header declarations, implementation definitions, call sites, and the item logic table instead of renaming only the C body.
Removed a named zero float and used the literal 0.0f at call sites, consistent with avoiding unnecessary named literal storage when the value is ordinary and no ownership evidence is shown.
Used existing item/JObj accessor macros in several cleanup spots rather than open-coding direct gobj fields everywhere.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For focused cleanup PRs, symbol/header/source/table renames should move together so naming stays coherent at every reference surface.
A named TU-local zero float can be removed in favor of an inline 0.0f literal when the diff shows it is just an ordinary argument value and bot feedback confirms data matching did not regress.
Remove narrow stack-padding tactics when the cleaned source no longer needs them, but do not infer that every remaining PAD_STACK in the file is removable without function-specific evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: remaining PAD_STACK(8) in itDosei_UnkMotion0_Coll and itDosei_UnkMotion7_Coll

naming_conventions.convention: Dosei-owned logic functions use the itDosei_Logic7_* prefix rather than the table/file-oriented it_3F14_Logic7_* prefix.
Unknown Dosei-local address-style functions were renamed from generic fn_ or it_ address names to itDosei_8028xxxx while preserving the address suffix when semantics remain unknown.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Removed one PAD_STACK(8) from itDosei_Logic7_Spawned as part of a cleanup pass.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The slice does not include local objdiff output for the stack-pad removal; only the merged diff and bot data report are present.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used inline 0.0f rather than a const f32 symbol for a repeated zero argument to itDosei_FacingAngle.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: delete it_804DC878 and replace argument uses
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Evidence supports the data result but does not include text-section objdiff details.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced accessor macros GET_ITEM and GET_JOBJ selectively where they matched existing object access roles.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The PR title explicitly mentions adding GET_* usage; no review discussion explains broader policy.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 showed matched data 41.53% (+0.00%, +56 bytes) and one new match: main/melee/it/items/itdosei .sdata2 +3 bytes from 96.30% to 100.00%.

follow_up_queries: Find other item files with functions still named it_3F14_Logic* where item-specific prefixes may be known.
Search for TU-local const f32 symbols equal to 0.0f used only as ordinary call arguments.
Search itdosei.c for remaining PAD_STACK instances and verify whether each is still required with local objdiff evidence.
Search for direct gobj->user_data or gobj->hsd_obj in item TUs where GET_ITEM or GET_JOBJ is already the local convention.
Check whether itDosei_8028xxxx address-style names have enough callsite evidence for future semantic renames.

raw_diff: complete visible hunks for main cleanup areas, but diff file is marked truncated
changed_files.jsonl: all four changed files with added/deleted counts
text_corpus.jsonl: empty PR body and one bot report
raw_pr_json: PR metadata, body null, merged_at present
notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
Diff evidence is enough to describe changed files and concrete code edits, but the loaded raw_diff is marked truncated, so header tail details are not fully visible.
Automation evidence reports a data match improvement, but no local build, text objdiff, or adjacent-function regression output is included.
Merged state is supported by metadata, but no reviewer intent or acceptance rationale is present.
Do not infer that all GET_* replacements or all PAD_STACK removals are globally safe from this single PR.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Synchronize item function renames across symbol, header, implementation, and table references
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2612 shows a coherent Dosei cleanup where function names were changed in config/GALE01/symbols.txt, src/melee/it/items/itdosei.h, src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c, and the Dosei entry in src/melee/it/it_3F14.c. This is a useful review pattern for item rename cleanup.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep unknown item-local names address-style while adding the known item prefix
accepted_candidate_records.text: When the item ownership is clear but semantics are still unknown, this PR used names like itDosei_80281390 and itDosei_80282CD4 rather than generic fn_ names or invented semantic names.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Remove ordinary named zero-float storage when an inline literal is enough
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2612 removed const f32 it_804DC878 = 0.0f and used 0.0f directly in itDosei_FacingAngle calls; the bot report showed the itdosei .sdata2 item reached 100.00%. Treat as a narrow cleanup pattern, not as proof for unrelated constants.

source_update_candidates.title: Dosei item code owns itDosei_* function naming under src/melee/it/items/itdosei.c
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2612 consistently moved Dosei logic and unknown address-style functions from it_3F14_/fn_/it_ prefixes to itDosei_* names across symbols, header, source, and item table references.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function renames across changed files
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for curator review; the PR supports the naming pattern for this item, but intake should not promote it directly.

source_update_candidates.title: Accessor macro cleanup should remain evidence-driven
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2612's title and diff show selected replacement of gobj->user_data and gobj->hsd_obj with GET_ITEM/GET_JOBJ. This may be worth documenting as a cleanup preference when local conventions and objdiff allow, but the PR slice lacks review discussion or text objdiff evidence for a broad standard.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible standard refinement, but evidence is too narrow to accept globally without curator comparison against current source conventions.

rejection_notes: Do not record a broad rule that all gobj->user_data or gobj->hsd_obj accesses should become GET_ITEM/GET_JOBJ; the PR only shows selected replacements.
Do not record that all remaining PAD_STACK instances in itdosei.c are unnecessary; the diff removes one but leaves others.
Do not infer semantic meanings for itDosei_80281390, itDosei_80281734, itDosei_80282CD4, or other address-style names beyond Dosei ownership.
Do not claim text-section matches or no regressions; the loaded slice only includes an automated data report, not objdiff or build logs.
